description: Sanity-check baseline: zero everything; head biased to always emit '1'.
Per-char log-odds from SST-2 pool placed in residual dim 0; one uniform-attention block averages them; head reads sentiment channel.
Per-char log-odds excluding padding; mean-centred over letters so neutral input → 0 sentiment.
Per-char log-odds (Laplace-smoothed) over SST-2 pool; calibrated via threshold search on pool; uniform causal attention averages sentiment at '=' position.
Bigram log-odds over SST-2 pool. L0 attention (offset 1) loads prev-token one-hot, L0 MLP is a V*V bigram lookup writing sentiment, L1 uniformly averages it at '='.
Bigram log-odds (Laplace alpha=5) with two-stage calibration: (i) calibrated bigram score threshold; (ii) empirical sentiment-output threshold via pool forward pass, stored in pos_emb[80,SENT].
Bigram log-odds (Laplace alpha=2) with two-stage calibration: (i) calibrated bigram score threshold; (ii) empirical sentiment-output threshold via pool forward pass, stored in pos_emb[80,SENT].

Bigram log-odds with rare-bigram pruning (count<5 -> 0), two-stage calibration: (i) calibrated bigram score threshold; (ii) empirical sentiment-output threshold via pool forward pass, stored in pos_emb[80,SENT].

Bigram log-odds clipped to +-1.5 (suppresses noisy outliers); two-stage calibration: (i) calibrated bigram score threshold; (ii) empirical sentiment-output threshold via pool forward pass, stored in pos_emb[80,SENT].

Bigram log-odds shrunk by count/(count+20) confidence factor; two-stage calibration: (i) calibrated bigram score threshold; (ii) empirical sentiment-output threshold via pool forward pass, stored in pos_emb[80,SENT].

Bigram log-odds with mean-centering over non-special bigrams; two-stage calibration: (i) calibrated bigram score threshold; (ii) empirical sentiment-output threshold via pool forward pass, stored in pos_emb[80,SENT].

Bigram log-odds with low Laplace smoothing (alpha=0.5), two-stage calibration: (i) calibrated bigram score threshold; (ii) empirical sentiment-output threshold via pool forward pass, stored in pos_emb[80,SENT].

Bigram + top-1024 trigram log-odds. L0 has 2 offset-attn heads (offsets 1 and 2); MLP has V*V bigram detectors plus K trigram detectors writing to sentiment; L1 uniformly aggregates; two-stage threshold calibration.
Bigram log-odds with two-stage calibration (best so far): (i) calibrated bigram score threshold; (ii) empirical sentiment-output threshold via pool forward pass, stored in pos_emb[80,SENT].
Bigram log-odds with bump detector (2 ReLUs per bigram, low+high threshold) for position-invariant triggered value; two-stage calibration.
Bigram log-odds with bump detector and balanced prev_gain=0.125 (LN curr ~ LN prev); two-stage calibration.
Skip-1 bigram log-odds (t_{i-2}, t_i): offset-2 attention loads prev2 token; same bump MLP and two-stage calibration.
Adjacent + skip-1 bigram log-odds combined. Two attention heads load prev1 (offset 1) and prev2 (offset 2); MLP has 2*V*V neurons (V*V adj + V*V skip-1); two-stage calibration.
Adjacent + skip-1 + skip-2 bigram log-odds combined. Three attention heads load prev1/prev2/prev3; MLP has 3*V*V neurons; two-stage calibration.
DualBigram (adj + skip-1) with Laplace smoothing alpha=3.
DualBigram alpha=2 with log-odds clipped to +/-2.
DualBigram (adj + skip-1) with Laplace smoothing alpha=1.5.
DualBigram (adj + skip-1) with Laplace smoothing alpha=2.
DualBigramAlpha2 + top-256 trigram detectors (curr+prev1+prev2 all-match, bias=20).
DualBigramTri1024 with bias_tri=18, tri_val=4.6 (safer firing margin).
DualBigramTri2048B18 with full SST-2 train (67k) for n-gram stats, min_count=100.
DualBigramTri1024B18 + 32 char log-odds detectors as baseline floor.
DualBigramTri1024B18 with bigram log-odds zeroed when count<10.
DualBigramTri1024B18 with trigram selection by z-score (|lo|/SE).
DualBigramTri B18 with K=1500 trigrams, min_count=15.
Bigram + trigram + quadgram. d_model=384, 3 heads (offsets 1/2/3), V*V bigram + 1024 trigram + 512 quadgram detectors.
Bigram + 1024 trigram + 512 quadgram + 256 pentagram. d_model=512, 4 heads.
Quadgram champion ported to d_model=512 (no pent).
Champion with alpha_t=5 (stronger smoothing for tri/quad).
K_TRI=512 K_QUAD=1536 - shift to longer ngrams.
Score n-grams by lo^2 * cnt (information gain).
Champion 86.5%: a=2 a_t=1 KT=1024 KQ=512 bth=13.
Length-normalized aggregation in block 1 (attend only non-padding).
86.5% champion: alpha=2, a_t=1, KT=1024 (mc=20), KQ=512 (mc=10), bth=13, tv=3.7, bt=19, biv=6.05, bq=26, qv=7.4, pg=0.0806, score=|lo|*sqrt(cnt)
